Custom A-Frame Sidewalk Signs for High-Traffic Business Locations

The Simpo Sign A-Frame Kit delivers professional outdoor advertising with included hardware and (2) 27" X 22" full-color signs. Perfect for storefronts, restaurants, and retail businesses, this lightweight yet durable frame features molded handles for easy daily transport and positioning. The weather-resistant construction ensures your advertising message stays visible in outdoor conditions.

Each kit includes two custom-printed coroplast signs that can be easily inserted into the frame for immediate display. The portable design allows you to position your advertising exactly where foot traffic is highest, then store it safely indoors when needed.

For double-sided printed signs or custom sizing options, contact our customer service team for personalized assistance.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Coroplast Material for Outdoor A-Frame Sign Durability

Your Simpo Sign A-Frame kit includes professional hardware plus (2) 27" x 22" custom-printed signs made from premium materials designed for outdoor business use.

4mm Coroplast Sign Construction

Lightweight & Waterproof: Our 4mm coroplast material provides the perfect balance of durability and portability for daily sidewalk sign use. This plastic substrate is completely waterproof and resistant to weather conditions while remaining light enough for easy handling.

Digital Print Quality: Full-color digital printing directly onto the 4mm coroplast surface ensures vibrant colors and sharp text that attracts customer attention from a distance.

Business-Grade Durability: Designed to withstand daily outdoor use, wind resistance, and frequent repositioning without cracking or fading.

Request a free sample packet to see and feel our coroplast material quality before ordering.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

A-Frame Hardware & Assembly Options for Business Use

Your Simpo Sign A-Frame comes complete with professional-grade hardware designed for daily commercial use and easy setup.

Included Hardware Features

Molded Carry Handles: Built-in handles make it easy to transport your A-frame sign from storage to sidewalk position daily.

Lightweight Frame Construction: Durable yet lightweight frame design allows for easy positioning and repositioning throughout the day.

Weather-Resistant Assembly: Frame hardware is designed to withstand outdoor conditions while maintaining stability in wind and weather.

Easy Sign Insertion: Frame accepts 27" x 22" signs with simple insertion system - no tools required for daily sign changes.

Double-Sided Options

Double-sided printed signs are available for maximum visibility from both directions. Contact our customer service team to discuss double-sided printing options for your A-frame signs.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Production Times for Custom A-Frame Sidewalk Signs

We offer flexible production schedules to meet your business timeline needs. Choose from multiple turnaround options to ensure your A-frame signs arrive exactly when you need them.

2 Business Days Express Production

Fast turnaround for urgent business needs. Ideal when you need professional sidewalk signs quickly for grand openings, sales events, or immediate advertising needs.

3 Business Days Standard Production

Our most popular production option, providing the perfect balance of speed and convenience. This option includes free standard production timing for most custom A-frame orders.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Cost-effective production timing when you can plan ahead. Perfect for businesses ordering A-frame signs for future events or seasonal advertising.

Production Guidelines

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin production the following business day
  • Production time starts when artwork files are complete and approved
  • Proof requests will pause production until approval is received
  • Same-day rush options may be available - contact customer service for availability
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

A-Frame Sign Payment & Ordering Options

We provide secure and flexible payment options to make ordering your custom A-frame sidewalk signs convenient for your business.

Accepted Payment Methods

Credit Cards: We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover for immediate order processing.

Business Checks: Check payments are accepted and must be received before your A-frame signs enter production. Learn more about check order processing.

Payment Processing

All A-frame signs must be paid in full before production begins. Your credit card will not be charged until you have reviewed and approved your complete order details.

This payment protection ensures you have the opportunity to verify your A-frame sign specifications, artwork, and delivery details before any charges are processed.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for A-Frame Sidewalk Sign Delivery

We provide reliable shipping options to deliver your A-frame signs safely to your business location. Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 with any shipping questions before placing your order.

Available Shipping Methods

  • Economy Shipping: 5–10 Business Days - Most cost-effective option
  • Standard Shipping: 3–5 Business Days - Balanced speed and cost
  • Three Day Shipping: 3 Business Days - Faster delivery
  • Two Day Shipping: 2 Business Days - Express delivery
  • Overnight Shipping: 1 Business Day - Fastest option available

Shipping Guidelines

Tracking Information: You will receive a tracking number once your A-frame sign package ships.

Shipping Costs: Shipping prices are calculated based on package weight and destination. Additional charges apply to large or bulk orders.

Package Protection: If your A-frame signs are damaged during shipping, return the damaged items for immediate replacement. Lost packages are replaced after the shipping company confirms loss (typically 7-10 business days).

International Shipping

International customers must provide shipping labels and customs documentation. We accept international labels from USPS and UPS. Contact customer service for international shipping assistance.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Business & Retail Uses for Outdoor A-Frame Signs

A-frame sidewalk signs provide versatile advertising solutions for businesses that need to attract foot traffic and communicate with potential customers at street level.

Retail & Restaurant Applications

Daily Specials: Restaurants use A-frame signs to advertise lunch specials, happy hour deals, and seasonal menu items.

Store Promotions: Retail businesses display sales, new arrivals, and special offers to draw customers inside.

Directional Signage: Guide customers to entrances, parking areas, or special event locations.

Service Business Applications

Professional Services: Law offices, medical practices, and consulting businesses use A-frame signs for wayfinding and service advertising.

Automotive Services: Auto repair shops, car washes, and service centers advertise services and pricing.

Beauty & Wellness: Salons, spas, and fitness centers promote services and attract walk-in customers.

Event & Seasonal Applications

Grand Openings: New businesses use A-frame signs to announce their opening and attract initial customers.

Seasonal Sales: Businesses promote holiday sales, back-to-school specials, and seasonal inventory changes.

Special Events: Announce workshops, classes, or special business events to the local community.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

A-Frame Sidewalk Sign Artwork Requirements & Guidelines

Proper artwork preparation ensures your A-frame signs print with professional quality and maximum visual impact for your business advertising.

File Format Requirements

Vector Files (Recommended): .eps files with fonts converted to outlines provide the best print quality and sharpest text reproduction.

High-Resolution Options: .pdf, .tiff, or .jpg files at 300 dpi or higher resolution work well for most A-frame sign designs.

File Size Limit: Upload files up to 60 MB directly through our system. For larger files, contact customer service for upload instructions.

Design Considerations for A-Frame Signs

Text Readability: Use bold, high-contrast text that can be read from a distance by pedestrians and drivers.

Color Selection: Bright, contrasting colors improve visibility and attract attention in outdoor environments.

Message Clarity: Keep your message concise and focused - A-frame signs are viewed quickly by passing traffic.

Proofing Options

Order Proofs: Request a proof to review your artwork, verify order details, and check pricing before production begins. Production will not start until you approve the proof.

Color Match Proofs: For color-critical projects, our Color Match Proof System ensures accurate color reproduction. Contact customer service for color matching services.

If you're unsure about your file quality or need design assistance, our professional graphic designers are available to help optimize your A-frame sign artwork.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Your Custom A-Frame Sidewalk Signs Today

Transform your business visibility with professional A-frame sidewalk signs that attract customers and drive foot traffic. Our complete Simpo Sign kit includes everything you need to start advertising immediately.

Why Choose Banners.com for A-Frame Signs

Expert Customer Service: Our in-house customer service team consists of professional graphic designers ready to help with your A-frame sign project.

Flexible Production Times: Choose 1, 2, 3, or 5-day production options to meet your exact timeline requirements.

Premium Materials: We use only the finest coroplast materials and latest printing technology for durable, professional results.

Live Order Tracking: Monitor your A-frame sign order progress with our proprietary tracking system from production through delivery.

Ready to boost your business visibility? Configure your custom A-frame sidewalk signs above and start attracting more customers today.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About A-Frame Sidewalk Signs

What's included with the Simpo Sign A-Frame kit?

Each kit includes the Simpo Sign A-frame hardware and two 27" x 22" custom-printed coroplast signs. The frame features molded handles for easy transport and is designed for daily outdoor business use.

Can I get double-sided printed signs for my A-frame?

Yes, double-sided printing is available for maximum visibility from both directions. Contact our customer service team to discuss double-sided printing options for your specific needs.

How durable are the coroplast signs in outdoor conditions?

Our 4mm coroplast material is waterproof, weather-resistant, and designed for daily outdoor use. The material withstands wind, rain, and UV exposure while maintaining vibrant print quality.

How easy is it to change signs in the A-frame?

Very easy - the frame accepts 27" x 22" signs with a simple insertion system. No tools are required to change signs, making it perfect for businesses that want to update messaging regularly.

What file formats work best for A-frame sign artwork?

Vector files (.eps with fonts outlined) provide the best quality. We also accept high-resolution .pdf, .tiff, or .jpg files at 300 dpi or higher. Our design team can help optimize your artwork if needed.

How long does production take for A-frame signs?

We offer 2, 3, or 5 business day production options. Choose express 2-day for urgent needs, standard 3-day for most projects, or 5-day saver for cost-effective timing when you can plan ahead.

Can I request a proof before my signs go into production?

Yes, we highly recommend requesting a proof to review your artwork, verify order details, and confirm pricing. Production will not begin until you approve the proof.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
